prompt: Professional luxury monogram logo design. Two letter M's intertwined and overlapping to form an elegant geometric 3D symbol. The monogram uses sharp angular lines with a sense of depth and dimensionality — one M is white (#FFFFFF) and the other M is electric cyan (#00E3FF), creating an interlocking visual effect where they cross. Set on a pure black background (#0A0A0A). Below the monogram symbol, the text 'MM AGENCY.' appears in small, clean, uppercase sans-serif type with wide letter-spacing. The period is cyan. The overall aesthetic is premium, luxury brand identity — like a high-end fashion house or Swiss watch brand. Perfectly symmetrical, geometric precision, sharp clean lines. Vector-quality, studio brand presentation, 8K graphic design.
negative_prompt: gradients, noise, photography, human models, blurry text, watermarks, busy backgrounds, soft focus, hand-drawn, sketchy, grunge, vintage, retro, playful, cartoon, rounded corners, organic shapes, floral, ornamental, low resolution, pixelated, multiple colors beyond black white and cyan, busy, cluttered
